name: landing-page-summary
description: Recreation-quality landing page summarizer. Headless Playwright browser, 17-section markdown spec, in-system changelog, always re-fetches by default.

installs.purpose: Local routing index for saved landing page summaries

Global INDEX.md routing entry for the saved-summaries library. The skill itself is auto-discovered via Runneth's available-skills mechanism and is intentionally not indexed (per Runneth's rule: do not index /agent/.agents/skills/).

routines.title: LP library weekly refresh
routines.trigger: Offered after the first successful landing-page-summary run in a conversation. Sentinel-guarded by reminder title so it is offered at most once per conversation. User can decline or change cadence.
routines.purpose: Self-closing maintenance loop for the LP library and its indexes. Adds new pages, refreshes known pages, diffs against prior archive, prunes redundant history, retires dead URLs, syncs _index.md and /agent/INDEX.md with actual files, flags drift on dependent brand kits and CRO audits.
phases: A. Discover and fetch (new + existing URLs)
B. Material-change diff (hero headline, primary CTA, pricing, forms, intent)
C. History pruning (keep material + origin + 4 most recent, drop noise)
D. Retire dead URLs (move to _retired/, stop fetching)
E. Index hygiene (sync _index.md and /agent/INDEX.md with actual files)
F. Cross-skill drift flags (brand kits, CRO audits, and experiment backlogs flagged when sources change)
G. Report (compact block with footprint visible)

changelog.notes: Added post-install intro. After install completes, Runneth surfaces a short 'what just opened up + try this now' message sourced from post-install-intro.md.

Initial PR-ready release. Dynamic Playwright path discovery, always re-fetch by default (--use-cached opt-in), archive-before-overwrite page history, and an optional self-closing weekly LP-library refresh routine.

post-install.name: Introduce the new capability
post-install.description: Read post-install-intro.md from this use case folder. After all prior install and post-install steps complete, surface the file's sections to the user in chat as the closing message of the install turn: '## What just opened up' as prose, '## Try this now' as a numbered prompt list, '## Compounds with' only when present and at least one named use case is installed in the sandbox. Resolve any {{TOKEN}} placeholders using the same customize map applied during install.
